product_overview: A web-based rewards platform where users create accounts, complete tasks, earn coins, refer friends, and request withdrawals. It also includes an admin panel for managing withdrawal requests and overseeing platform activity.
core_goals: Allow users to register and log in securely
Allow users to complete earning tasks and receive rewards
Provide referral-based rewards and sharing tools
Allow users to request withdrawals and track payout status
Allow admins to review and update withdrawal requests

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Users can create an account and sign in to access the platform.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill in name, email, and password -> Optionally enter a referral code -> Submit registration form -> See confirmation and proceed to login
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit login form -> See dashboard

features.name: Task Earning
features.description: Authenticated users can view available tasks and complete them to earn coins.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/tasks -> View the task list -> Start a task -> Complete the task action -> See the task marked complete and rewards reflected in the account

features.name: Withdrawal Requests
features.description: Users can submit a payout request from their wallet when they have enough balance.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/wallet -> Select a payout method -> Enter payment details -> Submit the withdrawal request -> See a confirmation message
Navigate to /dashboard/wallet -> Select a payout method -> Enter payment details -> Submit the withdrawal request -> See an error message when the balance is below the minimum withdrawal amount

features.name: Referral Sharing
features.description: Users can view and share their referral link and review referral earnings and invited users.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/referrals -> View the personalized referral link -> Copy the referral link -> Review referral earnings and invited users

features.name: Admin Withdrawal Management
features.description: Admins can review withdrawal requests and update their status.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/withdrawals -> View pending withdrawal requests -> Approve or reject a request -> Mark an approved request as paid

routes.description: Public landing page for the rewards platform
User registration page with optional referral code
Authenticated user dashboard showing balance, earnings, and recent activity
Task listing page where users can complete tasks to earn coins
Wallet page for withdrawal requests and transaction history
Referral page to copy an invite link and review referral rewards
Admin dashboard overview requiring ADMIN role
Admin withdrawal management page for reviewing and updating requests

features.name: User Login
features.description: User signs in with email and password using credential-based authentication.

features.name: User Registration
features.description: New user creates an account with optional referral code and is redirected to login.
user_interactions: Fill name, email, and password fields

features.name: Task Completion
features.description: Authenticated users fetch available tasks and complete them to earn coins.
user_interactions: See task marked complete after completion

features.name: Withdrawal Request
features.description: Users request a payout by submitting withdrawal details when balance is sufficient.

features.name: Referral Sharing
features.description: Users copy a personalized referral link and track referral stats.
user_interactions: Review referral earnings and invited users

features.name: Admin Withdrawal Management
features.description: Admins view withdrawal requests and update request status.

known_limitations.issue: Forgot password link is a placeholder and does not lead to a recovery flow
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot reset forgotten passwords through the UI

known_limitations.issue: Crypto withdrawal option is marked coming soon and disabled in the UI
known_limitations.impact: Only PayPal withdrawals are currently functional

known_limitations.issue: Referral link generation falls back to localhost if NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL is not configured
known_limitations.impact: Referral links may be invalid in production without environment variable
